title: Buttery Turkish Butter Beans Stir-fry
description: A festive turkish dish featuring chewy butter beans cooked in a buttery sauce with aromatic spices and reduced to perfection.

ingredients.name: Butter Beans
ingredients.notes: Soaked overnight and cooked until tender

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and sauté for about 3 minutes until soft, then add garlic and red chili pepper. Stir-fry for another minute.
Stir in the butter beans with their cooking liquid and any soaking water used (if necessary).
Sprinkle cumin on top and stir to combine well.
Reduce heat to low, cover the skillet and simmer gently for about 20 minutes or until the sauce has reduced slightly and the beans are tender.
Serve warm, garnished with the Turkish spice blend.
